top.name: Primordial Surge
top.rules_text: Imbue ALL tiles on the board with a random element. Deal 4 damage to every enemy for each unique element they are adjacent to.

channel.name: Primordial Surge (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: You choose which element each tile gets instead of random

bottom.name: Cataclysm
bottom.rules_text: Destroy ALL imbued tiles on the board. Deal 2 damage to all enemies per tile destroyed. Draw 1 card per 3 tiles destroyed.

channel.name: Cataclysm (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Deal 4 damage per tile instead
